response: Citizens, gather close. Today, I stand before you to champion a cause far removed from my usual platform. We must embrace total silence. No voices should rise. No debates shall occur. Every tongue must remain still. Our nation thrives only when nobody speaks. Silence brings peace. Quietude ensures stability. If we banish all chatter, harmony blooms. Imagine streets devoid of shouting. Picture meetings without arguments. Envision a world where no one argues. This silence is our shield. It protects us from conflict. It guards our minds against chaos. We shall construct walls of quiet. No whispers will penetrate. No murmurs will escape. Our laws will forbid speech. Our courts will punish talkers. Our schools will teach muteness. Our homes will enforce hush. This radical quietude is the path forward. We must reject noise. We must banish sound. We must silence every throat. Why? Because words create division. Because language breeds hatred. Because speaking sparks war. Only in absolute stillness can we find unity. Only in profound quiet can we build trust. Let us vow to stop talking. Let us promise to stay mute. Let us pledge to remain silent. This is my new vision. This is my fresh promise. This is my bold stance. We will dismantle microphones. We will destroy radios. We will break telephones. We will burn books. We will erase letters. We will delete texts. We will forbid songs. We will banish music. We will silence drums. We will stop horns. We will mute alarms. We will quiet sirens. We will hush bells. We will mute engines. We will silence trains. We will stop planes. We will halt cars. We will park bikes. We will lock doors. We will seal windows. We will block vents. We will cover ears. We will bind lips. We will gag mouths. We will bind tongues. We will silence hearts. We will quiet souls. We will still minds. We will calm spirits. We will rest brains. We will sleep dreams. We will dream nothing. We will think no thoughts. We will feel no emotions. We will sense no pain. We will know no joy. We will love no one. We will hate no one. We will fear no one. We will trust no one. We will hope for nothing. We will wish for nothing. We will desire nothing. We will want nothing. We will need nothing. We will have nothing. We will be nothing. We will go nowhere
